intro: Artanthe heterophylla, also known as the Artanthe plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Annonaceae. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which may aid in reducing pain, improving cardiovascular health, and protecting against infections. Bioactive constituents of Artanthe heterophylla include alkaloids, phenolic compounds, and glycosides, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
